scope: paraphrase_human acceptable-path grading repair for non-transaction query drift
learner_facing_quality_improvement: Paraphrase eval no longer gives unrelated transactional-credit to lock and SQL basics prompts, so robustness scores better reflect whether learners reach the right concept family from natural-language paraphrases.
notes: The Spring propagation primer remains accepted only for the transactional-basics paraphrase where it is part of the same learner path.
Pilot-locked corpus docs were not modified.
